ORL.headline: Orlando takes road win streak into matchup with Boston
ORL.description: Orlando Magic (45-36, seventh in the Eastern Conference) vs. Boston Celtics (55-26, second in the Eastern Conference)

ORL.headline: Orlando Magic vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights
ORL.description: Orlando Magic vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights

ORL.headline: Wagner scores 25 as Magic beat Bulls 127-103 and move into sixth-place tie in the East with Toronto
ORL.description: — Franz Wagner scored 25 points, Jamal Cain added 20 and the Orlando Magic remained in the running to avoid the play-in tournament by beating the Chicago Bulls 127-103 on Friday night.

ORL.headline: Orlando faces Chicago on 4-game win streak
ORL.description: Orlando Magic (44-36, seventh in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (31-49, 12th in the Eastern Conference)

ORL.headline: NBA fines Magic $25K for violating injury reporting rules
ORL.description: The NBA fined the Orlando Magic $25,000 on Thursday for violating league injury reporting rules before Monday night's home game against the Detroit Pistons.

BOS.headline: Orlando takes road win streak into matchup with Boston
BOS.description: Orlando Magic (45-36, seventh in the Eastern Conference) vs. Boston Celtics (55-26, second in the Eastern Conference)

BOS.headline: NBA's Friday slate sees at least 168 out with injury or illness
BOS.description: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

BOS.headline: Celtics tie NBA record with 29 3s, clinch No. 2 seed
BOS.description: The Celtics tied the franchise and NBA record with 29 3s on their way to clinching the Eastern Conference's No. 2 playoff seed in a blowout win over the Pelicans.

BOS.headline: Sam Hauser scores 24, Celtics hit 29 3s, rout Pelicans 144-118 to clinch East's No. 2 playoff seed
BOS.description: — Sam Hauser had 24 points on eight 3-pointers, and the Boston Celtics tied the franchise and NBA record with 29 3s on their way to clinching the Eastern Conference’s No. 2 playoff seed with a 144-118 win over the New Orleans Pelicans on Friday night.

BOS.headline: New Orleans Pelicans vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights
BOS.description: New Orleans Pelicans vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights
